ShowTooltip.Name: Show Portrait Tooltip
ShowTooltip.Hint: Display a detailed tooltip when hovering over combat portraits showing Stamina, Characteristics, Speed, and other stats.

HeroImageSource.Name: Hero Image Source
HeroImageSource.Hint: Choose whether hero portraits use the token image or the actor portrait image.

MonsterImageSource.Name: Monster Image Source
MonsterImageSource.Hint: Choose whether monster portraits use the token image or the actor portrait image.

CapSquadStamina.Name: Cap Stamina at Maximum
CapSquadStamina.Hint: Prevent stamina from being set above the actor's maximum value. Useful for linked minion squads whose cumulative stamina can be accidentally over-set.

DeadOverlay.Name: Dead Status as Overlay
DeadOverlay.Hint: When the Dead status effect is applied via the token HUD, render it as a full-token overlay instead of a small icon in the corner.
